title: DCM Workflow
text: vignette demonstrates new unified architecture running DCM model. Note DCM subtypes (HigherOrder, BayesNet, Traditional, MIRT, IRT) automatically determined.
code: # library(pgdcm)  # If running locally without installing: source("R/GraphBuilder.R") source("R/ModelConfig.R") source("R/Workflow.R")  # Helper to find data files whether installed or running locally get_data_path <- function(filename) {     path <- system.file("extdata", filename, package = "pgdcm")     if (path == "") path <- paste0("inst/extdata/", filename)     return(path) } print("Building Graph from Q-Matrix...") graph_res <- build_from_q_matrix(     QMatrixFile = get_data_path("Q_dummy.csv"),     DefaultAttributeCompute = "dina", # discrete DCM     DefaultTaskCompute = "dina" ) print("Creating DCM Model Configuration...")  DataDF <- read.csv(get_data_path("Data_dummy.csv"))  config <- build_model_config(graph_res, DataDF) print(paste("Configured Model Type:", config$type)) print("Starting Integrated Workflow...")  estimation_config <- list(     niter = 500,     nburnin = 100,     chains = 2,     prior_sims = 50,     post_sims = 50 )  results <- run_pgdcm_auto(     config = config,     estimation_config = estimation_config,     prefix = "Unified_DCM_Example" )

title: DCM Workflow
code: # library(pgdcm)  # If running locally without installing: source("R/GraphBuilder.R") source("R/ModelConfig.R") source("R/Workflow.R")  # Helper to find data files whether installed or running locally get_data_path <- function(filename) {     path <- system.file("extdata", filename, package = "pgdcm")     if (path == "") path <- paste0("inst/extdata/", filename)     return(path) }

title: DCM Workflow
code: print("Building Graph from Q-Matrix...") graph_res <- build_from_q_matrix(     QMatrixFile = get_data_path("Q_dummy.csv"),     DefaultAttributeCompute = "dina", # discrete DCM     DefaultTaskCompute = "dina" )

title: DCM Workflow
code: print("Creating DCM Model Configuration...")  DataDF <- read.csv(get_data_path("Data_dummy.csv"))  config <- build_model_config(graph_res, DataDF) print(paste("Configured Model Type:", config$type))

title: DCM Workflow
code: print("Starting Integrated Workflow...")  estimation_config <- list(     niter = 500,     nburnin = 100,     chains = 2,     prior_sims = 50,     post_sims = 50 )  results <- run_pgdcm_auto(     config = config,     estimation_config = estimation_config,     prefix = "Unified_DCM_Example" )

title: SEM Workflow
text: vignette demonstrates new unified architecture running SEM model.
code: # library(pgdcm)  # If running locally without installing: source("R/GraphBuilder.R") source("R/ModelConfig.R") source("R/Workflow.R")  # Helper to find data files whether installed or running locally get_data_path <- function(filename) {     path <- system.file("extdata", filename, package = "pgdcm")     if (path == "") path <- paste0("inst/extdata/", filename)     return(path) } print("Building Graph from Files...") graph_res <- build_from_node_edge_files(     NodesFile = get_data_path("Znodes.csv"),     EdgesFile = get_data_path("Zedges.csv") ) print("Creating SEM Model Configuration...")  library(readxl) DataDF <- read_excel(get_data_path("Zdata.xlsx"))  config <- build_model_config(graph_res, DataDF) print(paste("Configured Model Type:", config$type)) print("Starting Integrated Workflow...")  estimation_config <- list(     niter = 2000,     nburnin = 500,     chains = 2,     prior_sims = 50,     post_sims = 50 )  results <- run_pgdcm_auto(     config = config,     estimation_config = estimation_config,     prefix = "Unified_SEM_Example" )

title: SEM Workflow
code: # library(pgdcm)  # If running locally without installing: source("R/GraphBuilder.R") source("R/ModelConfig.R") source("R/Workflow.R")  # Helper to find data files whether installed or running locally get_data_path <- function(filename) {     path <- system.file("extdata", filename, package = "pgdcm")     if (path == "") path <- paste0("inst/extdata/", filename)     return(path) }

title: SEM Workflow
code: print("Building Graph from Files...") graph_res <- build_from_node_edge_files(     NodesFile = get_data_path("Znodes.csv"),     EdgesFile = get_data_path("Zedges.csv") )

title: SEM Workflow
code: print("Creating SEM Model Configuration...")  library(readxl) DataDF <- read_excel(get_data_path("Zdata.xlsx"))  config <- build_model_config(graph_res, DataDF) print(paste("Configured Model Type:", config$type))

title: SEM Workflow
code: print("Starting Integrated Workflow...")  estimation_config <- list(     niter = 2000,     nburnin = 500,     chains = 2,     prior_sims = 50,     post_sims = 50 )  results <- run_pgdcm_auto(     config = config,     estimation_config = estimation_config,     prefix = "Unified_SEM_Example" )

what: Build Graph from an Adjacency Matrix — build_from_adjacency
title: Build Graph from an Adjacency Matrix — build_from_adjacency
text: Constructs directed igraph object adjacency matrix. Identifies "Task" nodes based columns present dataset.

title: Build Graph from an Adjacency Matrix — build_from_adjacency
Build Graph from an Adjacency Matrix — build_from_adjacency
text: AdjMatrixFile Character. Path CSV file containing square adjacency matrix. DataFileCols Character vector. Names columns present observational data, used map "Task" nodes. DefaultAttributeCompute Character. Default compute rule attributes. Default "zscore". DefaultTaskCompute Character. Default compute rule tasks. Default "dina".

title: Build Graph from an Adjacency Matrix — build_from_adjacency
text: topologically sorted igraph object.

title: Generate Posterior/Prior Predictive Plots — generate_ppc_plots
text: Creates diagnostic PDF plots comparing simulated vs observed statistics including global means, score distributions, item difficulties, co-occurrences.

title: Generate Posterior/Prior Predictive Plots — generate_ppc_plots
code: generate_ppc_plots(   filename,   title_suffix,   simMeans,   simRowMeans,   simColMeans,   avgSimM2,   obsColMeans,   obsRowMeans,   obsMean,   M2_obs )

title: Generate Posterior/Prior Predictive Plots — generate_ppc_plots
text: filename Character. Output path PDF file. title_suffix Character. Title suffix appended plot titles. simMeans Numeric vector. Simulated global means. simRowMeans Numeric matrix. Simulated row (participant) means. simColMeans Numeric matrix. Simulated column (item) means. avgSimM2 Numeric matrix. Simulated average second-order moments. obsColMeans Numeric vector. Observed column means. obsRowMeans Numeric vector. Observed row means. obsMean Numeric. Observed global mean. M2_obs Numeric matrix. Observed second-order moments.

title: Generate Posterior/Prior Predictive Plots — generate_ppc_plots
text: NULL. Saves PDF file specified path.

what: Run Integrated Workflow (Prior, MCMC, Posterior) — run_pgdcm_auto
title: Run Integrated Workflow (Prior, MCMC, Posterior) — run_pgdcm_auto
text: Orchestrates complete end--end Bayesian estimation pipeline PGDCM SEM. Computes prior predictive checks, compiles runs Nimble MCMC, assesses convergence, generates posterior predictive checks.

title: Run Integrated Workflow (Prior, MCMC, Posterior) — run_pgdcm_auto
Run Integrated Workflow (Prior, MCMC, Posterior) — run_pgdcm_auto
text: config Model configuration list build_model_config. estimation_config List parameters controlling MCMC execution (niter, nburnin, chains, prior_sims, post_sims). prefix Character. Descriptor prefix used saving generated reports.

title: Run Integrated Workflow (Prior, MCMC, Posterior) — run_pgdcm_auto
text: comprehensive list containing raw mcmc_out, samples (cleaned), prior_ppc, post_ppc objects.

what: Run Predictive Check (Prior or Posterior) — run_predictive_check
title: Run Predictive Check (Prior or Posterior) — run_predictive_check
text: Simulates responses specified Nimble model using either priors provided posterior distribution matrix. Generates corresponding diagnostic plots.

title: Run Predictive Check (Prior or Posterior) — run_predictive_check
code: run_predictive_check(   config,   obs_X,   posterior_samples = NULL,   n_sim = 50,   prefix = "Unified",   title = "PPC" )

title: Run Predictive Check (Prior or Posterior) — run_predictive_check
text: config Model configuration list build_model_config. obs_X Numeric matrix observed data compare . posterior_samples Optional mcmc.list matrix posterior samples. NULL, simulates priors. n_sim Numeric. Number simulations draw. Default 50. prefix Character. Prefix output plot filename. title Character. String used labeling (e.g., "PriorPPC").

title: Run Predictive Check (Prior or Posterior) — run_predictive_check
text: list containing simulated observed statistics.
